title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 12%.

items.title:
Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: New Survation poll of Makerfield has Burnham 10 points up.

LAB: 49% (+6)
REF: 39% (-1)
RTR: 8% (+1)
GRN: 2% (-1)
LDEM: 1% (-3)
CON: 1% (-1)
